# Usage Example:

**Query with Enterprise Requirements:**
> Use syncfusion-generator skill to get enterprise architecture guidance for implementing Syncfusion components with license optimization and performance strategies for large-scale data.
**带企业需求的提问：**
> 使用 syncfusion-generator skill，获取关于实现 Syncfusion 组件的企业架构指导，包含许可证优化和大规模数据性能策略。
